source_section.title_label_raw: General Design Requirements Development Subject to Design Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements Development Subject to Design Requirements

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Development Subject to Design Requirements
provisions.text: With the exception of the developments listed under Section 353 and subject to Sections 354 and 355, any developments in the DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, ER-3, ER-2, CH-2, CH-1, CLI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, and RPK zones shall meet all the applicable design requirements contained within this Part. (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24) Development Exempted from Design Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: The following developments are exempted from all design requirements contained within this Part:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: any development exempted from requiring a development permit in Section 9;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: low-density dwelling uses, excluding:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: a townhouse dwelling use in any zone,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: a two-unit dwelling use within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A), as shown on Schedule 3C,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: a three-unit dwelling use within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A), as shown on Schedule 3C, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: a four-unit dwelling use within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A), as shown on Schedule 3C; (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: backyard suite uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: enlargement, alterations and replacements in existing window and door openings; (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: new window and door openings on any portion of a building; (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: a building addition with a floor area of 500 square metres or less, which does not alter a streetwall;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: a building addition that alters a streetwall, where the addition does not exceed 10.0 metres along the width of the streetwall; (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: changes to external cladding materials for any wall that is not a streetwall; (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: changes to external cladding materials for no more than 40% of any streetwall; (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: interior renovations;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: the installation and replacement of minor building features;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: a change of use or tenancy in a building that does not change the external appearance of the building, beyond what is already exempted within this Section;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: temporary construction uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: accessory structures;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: in the Dartmouth Waterfront (DW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3A, and the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedules 3B:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: shipping containers that are no greater than 3.0 metres in height, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: kiosks that are a maximum of 3.0 metres in height and have a maximum floor area of 32.0 square metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: steps, stairs, ramps, and other building entrances or entrance features;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: signs; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The following developments are exempted from all design
provisions.text: transportation facility uses. Applicability of the Design Requirements for Additions

sections.title_label_raw: For any addition to a main building that requires the applicability of

provisions.heading_context_raw: For any addition to a main building that requires the applicability of
provisions.text: For any addition to a main building that requires the applicability of the design requirements, the design requirements shall only apply to the addition. Applicable Design Requirements by Zone

sections.title_label_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: Table 11 for new main buildings; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: Table 12 for additions to existing main buildings.

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: The interpretation of Table 11 and Table 12 shall be as follows:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: The first column of Table 11 and Table 12 lists each design requirement;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: The remaining columns of Table 11 and Table 12 correspond to zones;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: A black dot () indicates that the design requirement in that row is applicable to the particular zones of that column;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: A white circle containing a number in black text (e.g., ①) within Table 11 and Table 12 indicates that the design requirement in that row is applicable to the zones of that column, subject to additional conditions in a corresponding footnote below Table 11 and Table 12 and subject to all other applicable provisions of this By-law; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: The applicable design requirements by zone are set out in:
provisions.text: The absence of a black dot (), or a white circle containing a number in black text (e.g., ①), indicates that the design requirement of that row is not applicable to the zones of that column.
